jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Curefit
jsonLd.description:
Curefit invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Curefit:
Curefit is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit!
